Video.summary: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 9, Poland

Video.summary: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 10, Hungary

Video.summary: The next stage of the SCL takes place in Holland with events such as the Atlas Stones and Truck Pull being witnessed
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 5, Holland

Video.summary: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.
Video.title: Stage 12 - SCL Poland 2023

Video.summary: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa

Video.summary: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World

Video.summary: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland

Video.summary: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023

Video.summary: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino

Video.summary: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers

Video.summary: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal

Video.summary: The fourth episode takes place in Finland with events such as Bus Pull and the forward hold
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 4, Finland

Video.summary: The SCL is in full swing and the sixth stage takes place in Latvia where the men are eager to break a national record held here
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 6, Latvia

Video.summary: We have returned to Portugal, at the beach of Eposende, to bring you EUROPE'S STRONGEST LATINO. In the beautiful sun of Portugal five cruel events are done in this heat: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Log Lift, Sandbag Toss, Medley.
Video.title: Stage 9 - PORTUGAL - 2024

Video.summary: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England

Video.summary: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking

Video.summary: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.
Video.title: Stage 11 - SCL Poland 2023

Video.summary: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.
Video.title: Stage 13 - SCL Cyprus 2023

Video.summary: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.
Video.title: Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia

Video.summary: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.
Video.title: Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia

Video.summary: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 1, Martinique

Video.summary: The second stage of 2014 Strongman champions League, in Cologne, Germany. 14 athletes from 12 different countries battled through six events on the second stop
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power

Image.alt: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power
SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power
SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power

Video.summary: The third episode is hosted in Serbia where world records are broken!
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 3, Serbia

Video.summary: The competition continues in Portugal with 6 events and thousands of spectators
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 7, Portugal

Video.summary: Episode 8 takes place in 36 degree heat in Croatia and sees the return of Krzysztof Radzikowski after a 2 month absence due to injury
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 8, Croatia
